commit_scope: Add source-marked Shambala 11111 as the stabilizing half of the verticality pair and bind it to a distinct runnable Form recipe.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/grammars/shamballa-codes.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/shamballa-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-channel-band.fk
local_validation.notes: The Shamballa code decoder passes three-way at 1111111, including code 11111 speaking its source-marked video provenance. The Shamballa channel passes three-way at 2111111111, including code-marked distinct verticality columns for 33333 and 11111, code 11111 mapping to lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens, and bound coverage increasing to 6.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push and GitHub checks on the existing PR.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and public deployment verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Shambala light code 11111 is present in the source-marked Shamballa code surface and has a runnable Form recipe that composes a receiving cell into a code-marked stabilizing vertical column distinct from 33333.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/grammars/shamballa-codes.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/shamballa-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-channel-band.fk

phase_gate.reason: Focused local Form proof passes; CI and production deployment proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/grammars/shamballa-codes.fk adds code 11111 as Verticality Code 11111 with source-marked video provenance.
form/form-stdlib/shamballa-channel.fk binds code 11111 to stabilize-verticality and makes verticality columns code-marked so 11111 and 33333 remain distinct content addresses.
form/form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-codes-band.fk verifies code 11111 decodes with earth-grounding function text and source id 4ITM3lwmXhU.

form/form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-channel-band.fk verifies code 11111 speaks, runs, yields a distinct seven-child code/purpose/five-landing column, maps to lc-ground-harder-when-field-quickens, and raises channel coverage to 6 bound codes.
docs/vision-kb/concepts/lc-codes-as-depth-not-dictionary.md keeps the concept body aligned with the paired runnable verticality channel.
